name: sleep-tracker-ai
description: Track sleep duration and quality, analyse patterns, and get personalised sleep recommendations. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: log_sleep
tools.description: Log a sleep entry. Hours slept, quality 1-10 (10=best), optional bedtime/wake_time (HH:MM), and notes.

tools.name: get_sleep_stats
tools.description: Get sleep statistics over the last N days. Includes averages, trends, and consistency scores.

tools.name: analyze_patterns
tools.description: Analyse sleep patterns to find correlations between bedtime, duration, quality, and notes.

tools.name: get_recommendations
tools.description: Get personalised sleep improvement recommendations based on your logged data.
